Maintain current SSRI or consider transition to high-dose SSRI/Clomipramine as appropriate for OCD treatment

differential_diagnoses: Bipolar II disorder, current depressive episode
next_steps: Perform comprehensive psychiatric evaluation including formal, documented suicide and homicide risk assessment
Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4) to rule out postpartum thyroiditis
Continue current SSRI therapy with titration to therapeutic doses for OCD if necessary
Initiate Cognitive Behavioral Therapy with Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP)
Implement a formal safety plan, including removal of dangerous household items and ensuring 24/7 support for infant care
Continue monitoring blood pressure and ensure coordination with obstetrics for postpartum hypertensive management
Provide intensive psychoeducation to the patient and family regarding ego-dystonic nature of intrusive thoughts
Arrange for professional lactation support to address physical discomfort and facilitate feeding goals
